title: Recompleted GUI
description: The new look of normal minecraft UI
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a11492e756ee3faf81a6dd88ae29135650c9a8f9.png)

# Note: This project has been completely updated.

### Vanilla interface - but with a more detailed approach!
- Regui offers you a similar look, but more 3D, minimalist looking containers, and more stony look.

Abandoned for 2 years and rebuilt from scratch in 3 weeks! By YAPK0.
